messages.blurry: Text is not sharp enough to read. Hold steady and pause briefly before taking the photo.
messages.too_dark: Label is too dark to read clearly. Use flash if needed and keep the camera straight to the label.
messages.glare: Flash reflection is covering part of the text. Slightly adjust your position to reduce glare.
messages.low_text_legibility: Label appears faded or damaged — do your best to capture it clearly.
messages.qr_code: Capture the full data label with serial and model numbers visible.
messages.obstructed: Something is blocking the label — move the obstruction and retake the photo.
messages.angled: Take the photo straight-on. Steep angles can blur parts of the serial or model number.
